import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./Navbar.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navbar=()=>{const[isOpen,setIsOpen]=useState(false);const toggleMenu=()=>{setIsOpen(!isOpen);};// Add click outside listener
